input.raw_input: HIPAA-compliant patient scheduling portal for a regional clinic network. Patients view lab results, book/reschedule appointments, message providers, and request prescription refills. Clinic staff manage availability and review messages. ~25 screens, 4 roles. Integrations: Epic FHIR, Stripe, Twilio, Okta. Responsive web, 20-week target.

expected_output: A bottom-up Work Breakdown Structure for the portal: work packages spanning discovery/requirements, UX & design, core build (scheduling, messaging, lab-results, refills), the four integrations (Epic FHIR, Stripe, Twilio, Okta), QA/compliance hardening, and deployment — each decomposed into estimable leaf tasks. Every leaf carries a phase, a roster role, and a sensible 3-point hour estimate; the decomposition should be proportional to a ~25-screen regulated build and not omit the integration or compliance work.
notes: WBS planner — healthcare. wbs_structural validates the tree is well-formed (leaves carry phase + roster role + ordered positive PERT, ≥3 leaves across ≥2 phases); plan_quality (judge) scores the decomposition against the project.

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app for a digital bank. New customers complete identity verification, document upload, sanctions/PEP screening, and risk scoring before an account opens. ~18 screens, 3 roles. Integrations: Persona, Plaid, a sanctions-screening API, and a core-banking API. SOC 2 + PCI-DSS. 16-week target.

expected_output: A bottom-up WBS for the KYC onboarding app: packages for discovery, UX & design, the onboarding flow (IDV, document upload, sanctions/PEP screening, risk scoring), the four integrations, SOC 2 / PCI-DSS compliance hardening, QA, and deployment — decomposed into estimable leaf tasks each with a phase, a roster role, and a 3-point estimate. The breakdown should reflect the screening + risk-scoring complexity and the compliance load.
